https://pubs.opengroup.org/onlinepubs/9799919799/utilities/V3_chap01.html#tag_18_07

1.7 Intrinsic Utilities
As described in 2.9.1.4 Command Search and Execution, intrinsic utilities are not subject to a PATH search during command search and execution. The utilities named in Intrinsic Utilities shall be intrinsic utilities.

Table: Intrinsic Utilities


alias
bg
cd
 


command
fc
fg
 


getopts
hash
jobs
 


kill
read
type
 


ulimit
umask
unalias
 


wait
 

Whether any additional utility is considered an intrinsic utility is implementation-defined. Because applications are unable to override an intrinsic utility with a utility from PATH , implementations should not make any utility an intrinsic utility beyond the utilities in Intrinsic Utilities.
